en.CSAMReportForm-Header: File a Report: Help Seeker Sexual Abuse Material
en.CSAMReportForm-ContactDetailsDescription: Reports can be filed anonymously or with connection details if the help seeker would like to follow up or be available to provide further details to IWF.
en.CSAMReportForm-ContactDetailsInfo: Connection details will be recorded on the IWF database for 3 months, and then will then be deleted in accordance with the UK Data Protection Act.
